text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: MSHR Table (每 SM ~48-64 entries)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Entry 0: addr=0x1000, pending=3

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Entry 1: addr=0x2080, pending=1

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:11.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: ← 3 个 Warp 在等这个 cache line

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Entry 2: addr=0x3100, pending=5

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Entry 47: (空)

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: MSHR 是 L1 Cache 和 NoC 之间的关键硬件:

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 作用:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 1. 跟踪正在进行的 L1 Cache Miss 请求

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 2. 合并 (Coalesce) 指向同一 cache line 的多个请求

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 3. 限制同时在飞的请求数 → 防止 NoC 过载

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 工作方式:

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 当 Warp 发起一个 L1 Miss:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 1. 检查 MSHR 中是否已有对同一 cache line 的请求

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - 有 → 合并 (只增加 pending 计数, 不发新请求)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - 没有 → 分配新 MSHR entry, 向 L2 发请求

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 2. 如果 MSHR 已满 (所有 entry 都在用):

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6e3a1;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: → 该 Warp Stall! (在 ncu 中表现为 "Stall MIO Throttle")

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6e3a1;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: → 这是 Memory Bound kernel 的常见瓶颈

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 3. 当 L2 返回数据:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6e3a1;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: → 释放 MSHR entry

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6e3a1;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: → 唤醒所有等待该 cache line 的 Warp

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 意义:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: MSHR 数量决定了 SM 能同时追踪多少个在飞的内存请求。

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 如果 kernel 的内存访问很散 (每个请求不同 cache line) 且访问量大:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6e3a1;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: → 很快耗尽 MSHR → Stall

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6e3a1;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: → 合并访问可以减少 MSHR 消耗 (多个请求合并为 1 个 entry)
